svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(248, 85, 82), rgb(230, 126, 128)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(248, 85, 82), rgb(230, 126, 128));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 158px; height: 1px; padding-top: 280px; margin-left: 6px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #5C6A72;
display: inline-block; font-size: 16px; font-family: 'LXGW WenKai Mono'; color: light-dark(#5C6A72, #D3C6AA); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
